questions.question: Which state/UT hosts the first helo India Women’s Hockey League (U-16)?
questions.explanation: The first ‘Khelo India Women’s Hockey League for U-16 girls’ is scheduled to start on August 16 at the Major Dhyanchand Stadium in New Delhi. The Khelo India Women’s Hockey League (U-21) was held over three phases in New Delhi and Lucknow earlier this year. A total of 16 teams across the country are participating and over 300 players will compete in the league.

questions.question: Rakesh Jhunjhunwala, who passed away recently, was associated with which profession?
questions.explanation: Veteran Stock market investor Rakesh Jhunjhunwala, passed away recently at the age of 62 in Mumbai. He was a promoter of the recently-launched Akasa Air. Also known as the ‘Big Bull’ of Dalal Street, he was a self-made trader, investor and businessman. His estimated net worth of around Rs 46,000 crore.

questions.question: Which pharma company has completed trials for its intranasal Covid vaccine candidate?
questions.explanation: Hyderabad-based Bharat Biotech has submitted data from Phase 3 clinical trials of BBV154, its intranasal Covid vaccine candidate, to the drug regulator. It has sought approval both as a primary two-dose vaccine, and a heterologous booster shot. A heterologous booster means the third or subsequent dose of the vaccine is different from its primary dose.

questions.question: Which country passed the ‘Inflation Reduction Act, 2022’?
questions.explanation: The US government recently passed Inflation Reduction Act, 2022, joining forces with its central bank in the fight to reduce inflation. The US Federal Reserve has increased policy rates by an unprecedented 225 basis points over the last four monetary policy meetings. The act aims to boost government revenues by around USD 737 billion, and spend USD 437 billion during 2022-31. The savings is expected to translate into lower deficits.

questions.question: Which state/UT is developing a dedicated e-commerce app for local artisans?
questions.explanation: An e-commerce platform is being developed to connect the buyers directly with the local artisans in Jammu and Kashmir. This will help uplift the artisan community and promote the handicraft in the UT. A Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) has been signed with Flipkart to help the local artisans to sell their products.

questions.question: Which is the venue of the ‘International Conference on Responsible Packaging’?
questions.explanation: International Conference on Responsible Packaging is set to be held in New Delhi. It is organised by the Foundation for innovative packaging and sustainability (FIPS). The event focuses on optimal design, innovative material and sustainable technology. An award for responsible packaging called the Foundation for innovative packaging and sustainability Award (FIPSA) will also be launched.

questions.question: Which state launched ‘Vidya Rath-School on Wheels’ project?
questions.explanation: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma launched Vidya Rath-School on Wheels project. It aims to provide access to underprivileged children to elementary education for 10 months. After 10 months, the children will be integrated into the usual system of education. Students will be offered free mid-day meals, uniforms, and textbooks under the project.

questions.question: How many cities have recently declared themselves as ‘Safai Mitra Surakshit Shehar’ (as of August 2022)?
questions.explanation: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs announce that 500 cities across India have declared themselves as ‘Safai Mitra Surakshit Shehar’. These cities achieved adequacy institutional capacity, manpower and equipment norms as stipulated by the Ministry and provide safe working conditions for sanitation workers. Swachh Bharat Mission-Urban promotes sustainable sanitation practices.

questions.question: Who has been recommended as the Chairman of NABARD by FSIB?
questions.explanation: The Financial Services Institutions Bureau (FSIB) recommended Mohammad Mustafa as the Chairman of National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD). The final decision on the recommendation would be taken by the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet, headed by Prime Minister Narendra Modi. NABARD is the apex regulatory body for overall regulation of regional rural banks and apex cooperative banks in India.

questions.question: Which is the headquarters of the International Transport Forum (ITF)?
questions.explanation: The Union Cabinet, chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, approved the signing of a contract between India and France to support International Transport Forum (ITF) activities in Indian transport sector. The International Transport Forum, an inter-governmental organisation within the OECD system, is global body mandating all modes of transport. It is headquartered in Paris, France.
